Package com.saperion.connector.rmi

Class AbstractRMIClientCommand

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.connector.rmi.AbstractRMIClientCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
SaRMIClientCommand
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractFolderRMIClientCommand
public abstract class AbstractRMIClientCommand extends Object implements SaRMIClientCommand
Class representing the base class for all client wrappers for the backend operations.

  • Method Details

    • reLogon

      protected void reLogon() throws SaSystemException
      Throws:
      SaSystemException - System exception

    • reLogonAfterConnectionFailure

      protected boolean reLogonAfterConnectionFailure(Exception e) throws SaSystemException
      If the cause of the exception is a connection failure, this methods performs a relogon.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception caught after first attempting to call a remote-method
      Returns:
      true if relogon was performed or false if the cause of the exception was no connection failure
      Throws:
      SaSystemException - if the relogon failed

    • init

      protected void init() throws NotBoundException, RemoteException
      Throws:
      NotBoundException - Not bound
      RemoteException - Remote exception

      public SaRMIServerCommand getRemoteCommand()
